有人問我對重訓的感覺是什麼。
我想了想說：很複雜。

複雜到——一半是成就感，一半是明天絕對站不起來的痠痛。
真要說的話，痠痛那半的比例，好像每天都在偷偷變大。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個嘴巴說熱愛重訓、身體卻天天在哀嚎的朋友，主打誠實的矛盾
variations: 更新：今天對重訓的感覺已經從「複雜」升級成「純痠痛」，成就感請假了。
備註：我對舉鐵是又愛又恨，愛的那部分負責報名，恨的那部分負責隔天。

en.content:
Someone asked how I feel about lifting.
I thought about it and said: it's complicated.

Complicated as in — half a sense of accomplishment, half the certainty that I won't be able to stand up tomorrow.
And honestly, the sore half seems to be quietly growing bigger every single day.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who claims to love lifting while their body files a daily complaint — the theme is an honest contradiction
variations: Update: my feelings about lifting today have been upgraded from 'complicated' to 'purely sore.' The accomplishment part called in absent.
Note: I have a love-hate thing with the barbell — the love part handles signing up, the hate part handles the next morning.

items.sourceNote: 「My motivation showed up late and still left early」把動力擬人化成不可靠同事

zh-tw.content:
我的健身動力是我合作過最不可靠的隊友。
它今天遲到了四十分鐘，做了一組就說要先走。

最後留下來把整場練完的，是我的罪惡感——它從不請假，也從不遲到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次都靠罪惡感撐完訓練的朋友，主打把動力和罪惡感當兩個同事來吐槽
variations: 更新：今天動力乾脆沒出現，是罪惡感一個人把我拖進健身房的。
備註：如果動力會被開除，我早就換一個了，可惜它是約聘的。

en.content:
My gym motivation is the least reliable teammate I've ever worked with.
Today it clocked in forty minutes late, did one set, and said it had to head out early.

The one who actually stayed and finished the whole session was my guilt — it never takes a day off and it's never once been late.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who gets through every workout on guilt alone — the joke treats motivation and guilt as two coworkers
variations: Update: motivation just didn't show up today, so guilt dragged me to the gym all by itself.
Note: if you could fire motivation I'd have replaced it ages ago, but unfortunately it's on a contract.

items.sourceNote: 「Standing after leg day is parkour / DOMS = stairway to pain」練腿隔天下樓梯梗重寫

zh-tw.content:
練完腿的隔天，樓梯對我來說已經不是樓梯了。
是一座需要規劃路線、心理建設、還要抓好扶手的極限運動。

我下一層樓花的時間，比我上一場深蹲的組間休息還久。
zh-tw.editorNote: 練腿日隔天傳給同樣不敢下樓的健身戰友，搭配一張站在樓梯口猶豫的照片
variations: 更新：今天我改坐電梯了，被同事問是不是腳受傷，我說對，傷在自尊。
備註：辦公室在三樓,今天感覺像在攻頂。

en.content:
The day after leg day, a staircase is no longer a staircase to me.
It's an extreme sport that requires route planning, a pep talk, and a firm grip on the handrail.

Getting down one floor takes me longer than the rest period between my squat sets.
en.editorNote: Send the morning after leg day to the buddy who also dreads stairs — pair it with a photo of yourself hesitating at the top step
variations: Update: I took the elevator today and a coworker asked if I'd hurt my leg. I said yes — the injury is to my dignity.
Note: the office is on the third floor and today it felt like a summit push.

items.sourceNote: 「I love telling people I went to the gym」重點在宣布而不在練的自嘲重寫

zh-tw.content:
老實說，我不是那麼愛健身。
我愛的是走出健身房那一刻，跟全世界宣布我剛剛去了健身房。

真正流最多汗的環節，是我在門口糾結限動要配哪張照片、打哪句標題。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個練十五分鐘、發限動花三十分鐘的朋友，主打儀式感大於訓練量
variations: 更新：今天我限動發得很用心，訓練菜單只做了一半。
備註：我的核心肌群還好，但我的發文技巧已經練到很強了。

en.content:
Honestly, I don't love the gym that much.
What I love is the moment I walk out and announce to the entire world that I just went to the gym.

The part where I sweat the most is standing at the door agonizing over which photo to post and what caption to write.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who trains for fifteen minutes and spends thirty on the story post — the theme is ritual over reps
variations: Update: I put real effort into my story today and only got through half my workout.
Note: my core is fine, but my posting game is absolutely shredded.

items.sourceNote: 「Rest day = my religion」把休息日當成最虔誠的信仰重寫

zh-tw.content:
別人問我最認真對待的訓練是哪一天。
我毫不猶豫地說：休息日。

這是我唯一從不缺席、從不遲到、還會提早開始的一天。
如果虔誠也能練出肌肉，我現在應該是全健身房最壯的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個訓練日常常翹掉、休息日卻執行得一絲不苟的朋友，主打反差自嘲
variations: 更新：今天本來是訓練日，但我臨時把它升級成休息日，執行得非常成功。
備註：我一週安排三天休息日，剩下四天用來規劃休息日。

en.content:
Someone asked which training day I take most seriously.
Without hesitation I said: rest day.

It's the one day I never skip, never show up late for, and actually start early.
If devotion built muscle, I'd be the most jacked person in the whole gym by now.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who flakes on training days but observes rest day with total discipline — the theme is the contrast
variations: Update: today was supposed to be a training day, but I upgraded it to a rest day on short notice and executed flawlessly.
Note: I schedule three rest days a week and use the other four to plan my rest days.

items.sourceNote: 「the dumbbells humbled us both」情侶一起健身互相逞強被啞鈴教訓重寫

zh-tw.content:
我跟另一半決定一起健身，互相加油打氣。
他為了在我面前有面子，多加了兩片槓片。
我為了不輸他，也偷偷加了兩片。

結果那組啞鈴很公平——它一視同仁地把我們兩個都教訓了一頓，隔天我們是牽著手一起哀嚎的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個跟伴侶一起健身、卻默默在較勁的朋友，主打逞強最後雙雙陣亡的甜蜜
variations: 更新：今天我們約好誰先喊累誰洗碗，結果兩個同時倒地，碗還在水槽裡。
備註：一起變壯的浪漫我還沒體驗到，一起痠到下不了床倒是很有默契。

en.content:
My partner and I decided to work out together and cheer each other on.
To look impressive in front of me, he slapped on two extra plates.
Not to be outdone, I quietly added two of my own.

Those dumbbells turned out to be very fair — they humbled the two of us equally, and the next day we were groaning in pain hand in hand.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who trains with their partner while secretly competing — the theme is showing off and getting wrecked together, sweetly
variations: Update: we agreed whoever taps out first does the dishes, and we both collapsed at the same time. The dishes are still in the sink.
Note: I haven't experienced the romance of getting strong together yet, but being too sore to get out of bed together — we've got that down.

items.sourceNote: 「pre-workout 讓我心跳很快但沒動」把高咖啡因先鋒補劑的抖動重寫成先跳舞後躺平

zh-tw.content:
我喝了先鋒補劑，心跳一分鐘一百四。
手在抖、頭皮發麻、全世界都是我的。

然後我坐在長椅上等這股勁上來，
等著等著，勁沒等到，先睡著了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個補劑喝得比水還多、卻只練了一組就在滑手機的朋友
variations: 更新：今天我把先鋒補劑加倍，成功在停車場就開始爆汗，然後決定改天再練。
備註：我不缺動力，我缺的是動力上來時我還醒著。

en.content:
I took my pre-workout and my heart rate hit 140.
Hands shaking, scalp tingling, the whole world was mine.

Then I sat on the bench waiting for the surge to kick in,
and while I waited, the surge never came — but the nap did.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who drinks more pre-workout than water yet does one set and starts scrolling
variations: Update: I doubled the pre-workout today, successfully broke a sweat in the parking lot, and decided to train some other day.
Note: I'm not short on motivation — I'm short on being awake when it finally arrives.

items.sourceNote: 「I run because I really like bagels」跑步只是為了吃的動機重寫

zh-tw.content:
教練問我為什麼要開始跑步。
我說：因為我真的很喜歡吃貝果。

我跑三公里，燒掉兩百大卡，
回家吃掉一個四百大卡的貝果，還加了奶油。
這不是有氧，這是一場穩賠的投資。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個運動只是為了心安理得吃東西的朋友，主打努力抵不過一口的誠實
variations: 更新：我今天多跑了一公里，獎勵自己第二個貝果，數學上我更胖了。
備註：我不是為了健康跑步，我是為了讓罪惡感有地方去。

en.content:
My trainer asked why I started running.
I said: because I really, really like bagels.

I run two miles, burn 200 calories,
go home and eat a 400-calorie bagel — with butter.
This isn't cardio, it's a guaranteed-loss investment.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who only exercises to justify eating — the theme is effort losing to a single bite
variations: Update: I ran an extra mile today and rewarded myself with a second bagel. Mathematically, I got chubbier.
Note: I don't run for my health, I run to give the guilt somewhere to go.

items.sourceNote: 「I'm not out of shape, I'm just in a different shape」不同形狀的自嘲重寫

zh-tw.content:
有人說我沒身材。
我糾正他：我有身材，只是走了一個比較圓潤的路線。

圓也是一種形狀，而且是最沒有稜角、最難被討厭的那種。
暑假到了，別人在練馬甲線，我在練一個親切的第一印象。
zh-tw.editorNote: 暑假前傳給那個開玩笑說要練身材、其實很享受現狀的朋友，主打圓得理直氣壯
variations: 更新：今天照鏡子，我決定把小腹正名為『情緒穩定儲備』。
備註：我不是沒在動，我只是把重量都存在身上，隨身攜帶。

en.content:
Someone said I'm out of shape.
I corrected them: I'm in a shape, it's just a rounder one.

Round is a shape too — the one with no sharp edges, the hardest kind to dislike.
Summer's here: everyone else is chasing abs, I'm cultivating a friendly first impression.
en.editorNote: Send before summer to the friend who jokes about getting in shape but secretly enjoys the status quo — the theme is being round and unapologetic
variations: Update: looked in the mirror today and decided to rebrand my belly as 'emotional stability reserves.'
Note: I'm not inactive, I just store all my weight on my person and carry it everywhere.

items.sourceNote: 「one shake = my weekly grocery intake」蛋白粉比買菜還貴的補劑預算自嘲重寫

zh-tw.content:
朋友問我這個月錢花去哪了。
我打開櫃子，裡面三罐蛋白粉、兩罐肌酸、一罐我看不懂的粉。

冰箱是空的，但我的補劑很豐盛。
我一天喝掉的蛋白質，比我一週吃進去的還多——這叫本末倒置，但練得很認真。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個薪水都拿去買補劑、正餐卻在吃泡麵的朋友，主打補劑比伙食貴的荒謬
variations: 更新：這個月我為了省錢改喝白開水配蛋白粉，成功省下買菜的錢，也省下了菜。
備註：別人的資產配置有股票有基金，我的是原味、巧克力、跟一個叫不出名字的口味。

en.content:
A friend asked where all my money went this month.
I opened the cabinet: three tubs of protein, two of creatine, one powder I can't identify.

The fridge is empty, but my supplement stack is a feast.
The protein I drink in a day is more than I eat in a week — priorities backwards, dedication forward.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who spends their paycheck on supplements while eating instant noodles for dinner — the theme is supplements costing more than groceries
variations: Update: to save money this month I switched to water and protein powder, successfully cutting my grocery bill — and my groceries.
Note: other people's portfolios have stocks and bonds. Mine has unflavored, chocolate, and one flavor I can't pronounce.

items.sourceNote: 「DOMS = Delayed Onset Miserable Stairs」練完腿爬樓梯像跑酷的角度重寫

zh-tw.content:
練腿的隔天，我看樓梯的眼神，像在看一座我付不起門票的遊樂設施。

坐下要用手扶，站起來要先深呼吸，上廁所變成一項極限運動。
昨天那個舉重的我，跟今天這個下不了樓的我，我認得後面那個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 練完腿的隔天發限動，配一張你扶著樓梯扶手的背影
variations: 更新：我現在下樓梯是一階一階側著身子下，像在退出一段不愉快的關係。
備註：DOMS 的中文我決定翻成『延遲性樓梯地獄』。

en.content:
The day after leg day, I look at a staircase like it's a theme-park ride I can't afford the ticket for.

Sitting down needs a handrail, standing up needs a deep breath, and going to the bathroom became an extreme sport.
Between yesterday's guy who squatted and today's guy who can't get down the stairs — I only recognize the second one.
en.editorNote: Post the day after leg day, with a back-shot of you clinging to the stair rail
variations: Update: I now descend stairs one step at a time, sideways, like I'm backing out of an awkward relationship.
Note: DOMS officially stands for Delayed Onset Miserable Stairs.

items.sourceNote: 「It's a rest day — I'm just resting between sets」休息日罪惡感自嘲重寫

zh-tw.content:
今天是休息日。
嚴格來說，是介於上一組和下一組之間的休息，只是這組之間隔了大概九天。

身體需要恢復，這是科學。
我的問題是，我的身體好像永遠處於恢復期，恢復到教練都忘了我長什麼樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每天都說『今天休息一下』、已經休息一整季的健身夥伴
variations: 更新：我把休息日排得很滿，滿到練習日已經沒有位置了。
備註：肌肉是在休息時長大的——我這個邏輯下去，應該已經是巨巨了。

en.content:
Today is a rest day.
Technically it's just rest between sets — this particular gap between sets is about nine days long.

The body needs recovery, that's science.
My issue is that my body seems to be permanently recovering — recovering so long the trainer forgot what I look like.
en.editorNote: Send to the gym buddy who says 'just resting today' every day and has been resting for a whole season
variations: Update: I've packed my rest days so tight there's no room left for training days.
Note: muscles grow during rest — by that logic I should already be enormous.

items.sourceNote: 「一月健身房超擠」的矛盾心情，改成暑假前湧入人潮的台灣夏季版

zh-tw.content:
暑假前的健身房，跑步機像演唱會搖滾區，每台都要排。

我對這件事的心情很複雜：
一方面我討厭等器材，一方面我很欣慰大家都想變好。
然後八月中人潮就會退，剩下我們這些常客，繼續在空蕩蕩的重訓區，練一個沒有觀眾的自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 暑假旺季在滿場的健身房發，主打又擠又莫名感動的矛盾
variations: 更新：今天為了等啞鈴，我培養出了三段新的興趣。
備註：暑假限定會員我都叫他們『候鳥』，天氣一涼就飛走。

en.content:
Right before summer, the gym treadmills are the front row of a concert — every one has a line.

My feelings about this are complicated:
part of me hates waiting for equipment, part of me is genuinely glad everyone wants to get better.
Then mid-August the crowd thins out, leaving us regulars to train an audience-less version of ourselves in an empty weight room.
en.editorNote: Post from a packed gym in peak summer season — the theme is being annoyed and weirdly moved at the same time
variations: Update: while waiting for a dumbbell today, I developed three new hobbies.
Note: I call the summer-only members 'migratory birds' — they fly off the moment it cools down.

items.sourceNote: 「I don't skip leg day, I just reschedule it indefinitely」無限延後練腿的拖延重寫

zh-tw.content:
我從來不翹練腿。
我只是把它『改期』，改到一個我目前還看不到的未來。

我的上半身很認真，胸、背、手臂都有在跟進，
所以我整個人看起來，像一顆很努力的棒棒糖。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個只練上半身、腿細得像手機腳架的朋友，主打理直氣壯的逃避
variations: 更新：教練終於盯我練腿了，我現在走路的樣子像剛學會用租來的腿。
備註：我不是不練腿，我是在等一個腿也想動的心情，這個心情很少來。

en.content:
I never skip leg day.
I just 'reschedule' it — to a future I currently can't see.

My upper body takes this seriously: chest, back, arms all keep up,
so overall I look like a very hardworking lollipop.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who only trains upper body and has legs like a phone tripod — the theme is unapologetic avoidance
variations: Update: the trainer finally made me do legs, and now I walk like I'm using a rented pair.
Note: I'm not avoiding leg day, I'm waiting for a mood where my legs also want to move — that mood rarely visits.

items.sourceNote: 「運動後的食慾大於消耗」練完更餓、越練越吃的自嘲重寫

zh-tw.content:
手錶說我這次訓練燒了四百大卡。
我很感動，於是點了一份八百大卡的餐來慶祝它。

運動最神奇的地方是，它不會讓你變瘦，
但它會給你一個吃東西時，非常理直氣壯的理由。
zh-tw.editorNote: 練完在餐廳點餐時發，配一張你面前豐盛餐點的照片
variations: 更新：我減重計畫的最大瓶頸，是我運動完的胃口。
備註：別人是為了吃而運動，我是運動完不小心變成為了運動而吃。

en.content:
My watch says this workout burned four hundred calories.
I was so moved I ordered an eight-hundred-calorie meal to celebrate it.

The magic of exercise isn't that it makes you thinner —
it's that it hands you a rock-solid excuse to eat.
en.editorNote: Post while ordering after a workout, paired with a photo of the feast in front of you
variations: Update: the biggest bottleneck in my weight-loss plan is my post-workout appetite.
Note: some people work out so they can eat. I accidentally became someone who eats so I can justify working out.

items.sourceNote: 2026 HYROX／競賽型functional fitness成為主流的趨勢觀察，改寫為報名衝動與現實落差的自嘲

zh-tw.content:
我朋友揪我報名那種要跑八公里、中間還要推雪橇的體能賽。
我當下說好，因為報名頁面看起來很熱血。

現在離比賽剩三週，我的訓練進度是：
已經把賽事官網的照片存下來，設成手機桌布。
zh-tw.editorNote: 報名了某個路跑或體能賽卻還沒開始練時發，配一張報名確認信截圖
variations: 報名費是我目前為止付出最多的努力。
我對這場比賽的準備，目前停留在「已經買了鞋」這個階段。

en.content:
A friend talked me into signing up for one of those races where you run five miles and push a sled in between.
I said yes immediately, because the signup page looked very inspiring.

Three weeks out, here's my training progress:
I saved a photo from the event website and made it my phone wallpaper.
en.editorNote: Post after signing up for a race you haven't started training for, with a screenshot of the confirmation email
variations: The entry fee remains the single biggest effort I have put into this event.
My preparation is currently at the 'bought the shoes' stage.

items.sourceNote: 高蛋白零食成為成長最快的營養趨勢，改寫為超市裡萬物皆標榜蛋白質的吐槽

zh-tw.content:
現在去超市，餅乾標蛋白質、布丁標蛋白質、汽水也標蛋白質。
我買了一整籃號稱高蛋白的零食，覺得自己非常自律。

回家算了一下，
總共十二克蛋白質，還有一千一百大卡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 逛超市或開零食包裝時發，配一張包裝上營養標示的特寫
variations: 包裝上寫「蛋白質」三個字，就能讓我心甘情願多付四十塊。
我不是在買零食，我是在買一個可以吃它的理由。

en.content:
These days the cookies say protein, the pudding says protein, even the soda says protein.
I filled a basket with high-protein snacks and felt extremely disciplined about it.

Then I did the math at home:
twelve grams of protein, eleven hundred calories.
en.editorNote: Post while grocery shopping or opening a snack, with a close-up of the nutrition label
variations: Put the word 'protein' on the package and I will happily pay a dollar more.
I'm not buying snacks. I'm buying permission to eat them.

items.sourceNote: 佔著器材滑手機的健身房禮儀吐槽，改寫為等待者的內心戲

zh-tw.content:
有人坐在臥推椅上滑手機滑了十八分鐘。
這十八分鐘裡，我在旁邊假裝伸展，拉了六種我平常根本不拉的肌肉。

他終於起身的那一刻，
我柔軟度創下人生新高，但今天的胸推一下都還沒做。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在健身房排隊等器材時發，配一張自己在角落假裝伸展的照片
variations: 我的柔軟度不是練出來的，是等出來的。
健身房最強的訓練項目叫做「等別人做完」。

en.content:
Someone sat on the bench scrolling his phone for eighteen minutes.
During those eighteen minutes I pretended to stretch and worked six muscles I never stretch.

By the time he finally stood up,
my flexibility had hit an all-time high and I hadn't pressed a single rep.
en.editorNote: Post while waiting for equipment, with a photo of you fake-stretching in the corner
variations: My mobility didn't come from training. It came from waiting.
The hardest exercise at any gym is called 'waiting for someone else to finish.'

items.sourceNote: 健身包裡的裝備遠多於實際使用量的自嘲，改寫為裝備派健身者的內心告白

zh-tw.content:
我的健身包裡有：助握帶、腰帶、護膝、兩種握力墊、一條彈力帶。
今天我全部帶去了。

實際用到的東西是：水壺。
zh-tw.editorNote: 整理健身包或開箱新裝備時發，配一張把包包內容物全部攤開的照片
variations: 我在裝備上的投資，遠遠超過我在訓練上的投入。
買齊裝備的那一刻，我覺得自己已經變強了，這種錯覺可以撐大概兩週。

en.content:
In my gym bag: straps, a belt, knee sleeves, two kinds of grip pads, and a resistance band.
Today I brought all of it.

What I actually used: the water bottle.
en.editorNote: Post while packing your gym bag or unboxing new gear, with everything laid out flat
variations: My investment in equipment massively outpaces my investment in training.
The moment I finished buying gear I felt stronger. That illusion lasted about two weeks.

items.sourceNote: 運動手環顯示消耗熱量後反手吃更多的自嘲，改寫為熱量帳戶入不敷出的段子

zh-tw.content:
運動手環跳出通知：恭喜你今天燃燒了 420 大卡！
我：太棒了，值得獎勵。

於是我點了一份鹹酥雞加珍奶，大約 900 大卡。

手環沒有再說話，它可能也放棄我了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 運動完在回家路上經過鹹酥雞攤時發，配一張手環螢幕的截圖
variations: 我的手環很勤勞，我的嘴巴更勤勞。
所謂運動，就是先預支一頓大餐的額度，再用兩小時分期還一點點。

en.content:
My fitness tracker buzzes: Congrats, you burned 420 calories today!
Me: Amazing, I've earned a treat.

So I order fried chicken and a large milk tea. About 900 calories.

The tracker goes quiet. I think it gave up on me too.
en.editorNote: Post on the walk home past the fried-chicken stand, with a screenshot of your tracker
variations: My tracker works hard. My mouth works harder.
Exercise is just borrowing the calories for a big meal, then paying back a tiny bit over two hours.

items.sourceNote: 團課最後一排偷懶隱形的共感體驗，原創展開為躲點名求生指南

zh-tw.content:
我報了團課，站在最後一排。

教練喊：跟上節奏！
我：慢半拍。
教練喊：加大幅度！
我：偷偷做簡化版。
教練：那位後面的同學，對，就是你——
我：低頭喝水，假裝沒聽到。

團課教會我最重要的一件事，是如何在四十分鐘內完全隱形。
zh-tw.editorNote: 第一次上團課或飛輪課後發，配一張站在最後一排的偷拍角度
variations: 我上團課的目標不是變強，是不要被點名。
前排的人在燃燒脂肪，我在後排燃燒求生意志。

en.content:
I signed up for a group class and stood in the very back row.

Instructor: Keep up with the beat!
Me: half a beat behind.
Instructor: Bigger range of motion!
Me: quietly doing the easy version.
Instructor: You there in the back — yes, you —
Me: head down, sipping water, pretending I didn't hear.

The most important thing group class taught me is how to be completely invisible for forty minutes.
en.editorNote: Post after your first group or spin class, shot from the safety of the back row
variations: My goal in group class isn't getting stronger, it's not getting called out.
The front row is burning fat. I'm in the back burning my will to survive.

items.sourceNote: 為面子在深蹲架上加片、又偷偷拆掉的內心戲，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我走到深蹲架前，霸氣地一片一片加上去，兩邊各兩片。
環顧四周，確認有人在看。

然後趁沒人注意，默默地一邊拆掉一片。

剛剛加上去是給觀眾看的，現在拆下來是給膝蓋看的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在深蹲架前猶豫重量時發，配一張槓片特寫
variations: 上槓那一刻我才想起，觀眾不會幫我扛。
面子加了四片，裡子只扛得動兩片。

en.content:
I walk up to the squat rack and confidently load the plates, two on each side.
I glance around to make sure people are watching.

Then, while no one's looking, I quietly strip one off each side.

Adding them was for the audience. Taking them off was for my knees.
en.editorNote: Post while deciding on your working weight, with a close-up of the plates
variations: The second I got under the bar, I remembered the audience won't spot me.
My ego loaded four plates. My body could only handle two.

items.sourceNote: 練出人生第一條血管後拚命炫耀、洗完澡就消失的自嘲，原創角度

zh-tw.content:
我練完手臂，前臂浮出一條青筋。

那一整天，我把袖子捲得高高的，
倒水、開門、滑手機都刻意用那隻手，
深怕別人沒注意到我人生第一條血管。

洗完澡它就消失了。
我對著手臂說：下次見。
zh-tw.editorNote: 難得練出一點血管線條時發，配一張刻意打光的前臂照
variations: 別人練一身肌肉，我練出一條可以炫耀一整天的青筋。
那條血管在的時候，我覺得我是健身選手；它走了，我又變回上班族。

en.content:
After arm day, one vein pops out on my forearm.

All day I roll my sleeves up high,
pour water, open doors, scroll my phone with that arm,
terrified someone might miss the first vein of my life.

It disappears after my shower.
I tell my arm: see you next time.
en.editorNote: Post on the rare day you get a little vascularity, with a well-lit forearm shot
variations: Some people build a whole physique. I built one vein I can show off all day.
With that vein I'm a fitness athlete. Without it, I'm just an office worker again.
